name: Chili Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can (16 oz.) Tomatoes and Juice or more as desired
4 teaspoons Chili Powder or more to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown onion in butter in a skillet.
2. Add ground beef and brown.
3. Drain off excess fat.
4. Add remaining ingredients, except cheese, and mix well.
5. Season with salt and pepper as desired.
6. Transfer mixture to a 3-quart baking dish.
7. Sprinkle with grated cheddar cheese.
8. Bake at 350°F for 40 to 50 minutes.
Serves 6 to 8
Source: "Mountain Measures"--Junior League of Charleston, WV ed. 1974
